name: Furfrou
description:
This is a animal. You shouldn't be doing anything sexual with it therefore it's banned. If you have any suggestions may please tell me? I'll make them :3

Furfrous vanilla design is in the picture because it's true they can be groomed but I didn't want to give it a exact groomed style. If you want your Furfrou to have a certain design outside of it's normal your going to have to make that clear to the AI.
creator: Snorlaxxy🥞
